channel.title: +Plato on आगमे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Plato on आगमे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: Phaedo
item.description: विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्) Title: Phaedo The Last Hours Of Socrates Author: Plato Translator: Benjamin Jowett Release Date: October 29, 2008 [EBook #1658] Last Updated: January 15, 2013 Language: English Character set encoding: ASCII Produced by Sue Asscher, and David Widger INTRODUCTION. Circumstance After an interval of some months or years, and at Phlius, a town of Peloponnesus, the tale of the last hours of Socrates is narrated to Echecrates and other Phliasians by Phaedo the ‘beloved disciple.
